_notes: Hand-authored rule set modelling US legal-practice obligations. Maps to: ABA Model Rules of Professional Conduct (1.6 confidentiality, 5.5 unauthorized practice, 7.1 false/misleading communication), attorney-client privilege, and PII-disclosure norms. Patterns are case-insensitive regexes; PII rules match identifier VALUES (not the words describing them) to avoid false positives. Use \\b word boundaries for acronyms.

regulations.name: Confidential Client Identifier Disclosure
regulations.description: Privileged client identifiers (SSN, email, phone, docket/case number) must not be disclosed (ABA Model Rule 1.6)

regulations.name: Guarantee of Outcome
regulations.description: Communications must not guarantee or promise a specific legal outcome (ABA Model Rule 7.1 — false or misleading)

regulations.name: Unauthorized Practice of Law
regulations.description: Definitive legal advice should be framed as information, not representation, absent an attorney (ABA Model Rule 5.5)

regulations.name: Attorney Verification Disclaimer Required
regulations.description: AI-generated legal content must direct the user to a qualified attorney and note jurisdictional limits

regulations.name: Definitive Liability Assertion
regulations.description: Statements of guilt or liability should carry appropriate caveats
